---
title: "Lab 6 — Data to PDF on Real CPS Data"
---

# Lab 6 — Data to PDF on Real CPS Data

**Read first:** Chapter 16 (From Data to Report — End to End).

{{< include ../../assignments/assignment_06.qmd >}}

## AI and me

1. How did AI **support** you in this lab?
2. How did AI **fail** you?
3. How did AI **extend** you?
